'''Raad Hak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] who served as a deck officer in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was in charge of [[Oracle Base]]'s hangar deck in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] and disliked the use of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Navy]].
